summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster, no shared canonical should be invented, and merge/fix/raise_pr actions are blocked. All listed PRs are open, non-security-sensitive, and should remain independently tracked rather than closed from this shard.

actions.reason: Open narrow bugfix PR with unresolved proof/merge-readiness, but not duplicate or superseded by another hydrated item.
Independent message-delivery fix candidate that needs proof/review resolution, not dedupe closure.
Independent feature/config PR with unresolved proof and dirty merge state; no safe close or merge recommendation is available.
Independent plugin API PR with author-followup state; should not be closed or merged from this inventory shard.
Independent ready-for-maintainer PR; no duplicate/supersession evidence and no merge action allowed in this job.
Independent channel fix candidate needing proof and conflict/review handling; not eligible for closeout or merge in plan mode.
Independent docs convention PR with waiting-on-author state; keep open for normal maintainer/author workflow.
Independent docs PR; even if low-signal, this job does not allow low-signal PR closeout.
Independent cron bugfix PR with unresolved proof and dirty merge state; no close or merge action is justified.
Independent maintainer-owned feature PR; preserve it for maintainer workflow rather than dedupe or closeout.
